title: Introduction to Visualization
content:
## Why Visualize Data?
Data visualization is the graphical representation of information and data.

### The Power of Sight
Humans are visual creatures. We can process complex patterns much faster when they are mapped to visual variables like color, size, and position.

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.plot([1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 6])
plt.show()
```
